name: nxtphaseai
description: NxtPhase plugin marketplace for Claude Code.

plugins.name: agent-eval
plugins.description: Auto-grades the agent's last turn against the user prompt — and against optional project rules in eval/eval.md — and appends a red/green scored card to eval/eval.html.

plugins.name: ask-visual
plugins.description: Visual AskUserQuestion: spins up a one-shot localhost HTTP server, serves a custom HTML form (cards, sliders, color pickers, anything), and feeds the user's submission back into the conversation as JSON.

plugins.name: nxtphase-design
plugins.description: Nxt Phase AI brand & design system as an invokable skill. Ships colors, type tokens, fonts, logos, the dot-icon rules, a website UI kit, and a presentation deck template — Dieter Rams / Braun-inspired, warm cream canvas, one Signal Green accent.
